title: astragalus heterodoxus
intro: Astragalus heterodoxus, also known as Huang qi, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of China, belonging to the legume family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus heterodoxus include enhanced immune function, improved cardiovascular health, and reduced inflammation, making it a popular remedy for various diseases. Astragalus heterodoxus can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as dried roots, capsules, and teas, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
